title: How to lint a systemverilog package properly
body:
Hello, I am trying to use verilator as a linting tool and write systemverilog in vscode. 

Each time I save a source file, suppose it as `tmp.sv`, the plugin will invoke verilator by command `verilator --lint-only -I some-search-directories --some-other-options tmp.sv`. This works fine when `tmp.sv` is only dependent on some modules, since verilator will search missing modules in directories specified by `-I` parameter.

But, if `tmp.sv` is dependent on some packages, verilator will complain that `%Error-PKGNODECL, Package/class xxxx not found, and needs to be predeclared`, even though I have specified the package path by `-I` parameter. 

Any workaround for this big pain?
